title: LG, Arbitrum launch blockchain-based bid for $679B ad market
summary: LG is building a blockchain focused on buying and selling ads, joining a wave of companies launching their own blockchains in recent years.

title: Coinbase launches tool letting AI agents make payments and trade crypto
summary: Coinbase for Agents will let users of the crypto exchange manage their holdings “without the constant manual oversight” and can autonomously perform a range of tasks.

title: Oil Extends Decline After Trump Says Deal With Iran Is Close
summary: Oil extended declines after President Donald Trump said a peace deal with Iran could be signed as soon as the weekend following US military strikes that cast doubt over progress to end the war.

title: Copper Prices Surge With Mining Stocks as Trump Flags Iran Deal
summary: Copper rallied and mining equities surged after President Donald Trump claimed the US was on the cusp of ending the war with Iran that has clouded prospects for the global economy.

title: OpenAI Wants a Price War With Anthropic—Is It Proving DeepSeek Right?

title: Bitcoin Must Prepare for Quantum Threat Now, Coinbase Says
summary: Coinbase's quantum advisory council says crypto developers should begin post-quantum migration work now, warning that unresolved questions around abandoned and vulnerable coins could become one of Bitcoin's biggest battles.
